title: 你量体温了吗？
pinyin: Nǐ liáng tǐ wēn le ma?
description_uz: «Senga nima bo'ldi? Ranging uncha yaxshi emas.» — kasal bo'lib qolgan do'st haqidagi suhbat. Bu dialog shamollash va isitma, harorat o'lchash, dori tugagani, kasalxona o'rniga dorixonaga borish va qanday dori olishni muhokama qilishni mashq qiladi. Salomatlik mavzusidagi foydali so'zlar — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Что с тобой? Ты неважно выглядишь.» — разговор о заболевшем друге. Диалог тренирует, как обсудить простуду и температуру, измерение градусника, закончившиеся лекарства, поход в аптеку вместо больницы и какие лекарства купить. Полезная лексика о здоровье — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «What's wrong? You don't look well.» — a chat about a friend who's fallen ill. This dialogue practices talking about a cold and fever, taking a temperature, running out of medicine, going to the pharmacy instead of the hospital, and which medicine to buy. Useful health vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zěn me le? Liǎn sè bú tài hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Senga nima bo'ldi? Ranging uncha yaxshi emas.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что с тобой? Ты неважно выглядишь.
sentences.text_translation_en: What's wrong? You don't look well.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ gǎn mào le, yǒu diǎnr fā shāo.
sentences.text_translation: Shamollab qoldim, bir oz isitmam bor.
sentences.text_translation_en: I've caught a cold, and I have a bit of a fever.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ liáng tǐ wēn le ma?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Liáng le, sān shí bā dù èr.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 还没有，家里的药吃完了。
sentences.pinyin: Hái méi yǒu, jiā li de yào chī wán le.
sentences.text_translation: Hali yo'q, uydagi dori tugab qoldi.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not yet — we're out of medicine at home.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ péi nǐ qù yī yuàn kàn kan ba.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Давай я схожу с тобой в больницу.
sentences.text_translation_en: Let me go with you to the hospital.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不用去医院，去药店买点药就行。
sentences.pinyin: Bú yòng qù yī yuàn, qù yào diàn mǎi diǎn yào jiù xíng.
sentences.text_translation: Kasalxonaga borish shart emas, dorixonadan dori olsak yetarli.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В больницу не нужно, достаточно купить лекарства в аптеке.
sentences.text_translation_en: No need for the hospital — just buying some medicine at the pharmacy is enough.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zhī dào fù jìn yǒu yào diàn ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты знаешь, есть ли поблизости аптека?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you know if there's a pharmacy nearby?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 知道，小区门口就有一家。
sentences.pinyin: Zhī dào, xiǎo qū mén kǒu jiù yǒu yì jiā.
sentences.text_translation: Bilaman, turar-joy majmuasi kiraverishida bittasi bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Знаю, у входа в микрорайон как раз есть одна.
sentences.text_translation_en: I do — there's one right at the entrance to our compound.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yào mǎi shén me yào?
sentences.text_translation_en: What medicine are you going to buy?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Mǎi tuì shāo yào hé gǎn mào yào.
sentences.text_translation: Isitma tushiruvchi va shamollashga qarshi dori.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ men yì qǐ qù ba.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_translation_en: Thank you for coming with me.
sentences.speaker: B
